name: Formula One 1986
attribution: Historical data derived from f1db (github.com/f1db/f1db, CC BY 4.0)
AI ratings from the community F-Classic_Gen1_1986.xml custom-AI set, matching the F1_Season_1986 skinpack (jusk)
notes: Coverage: f1db 1986 entrant Andrea de Cesaris (minardi+motori-moderni, rounds 1-16) has no livery in the referenced skinpack/AI set and is not included in this pack.
Coverage: f1db 1986 entrant Allen Berg (osella+alfa-romeo, rounds 7-12,14-16) has no livery in the referenced skinpack/AI set and is not included in this pack.
Coverage: f1db 1986 entrant Alex Caffi (osella+alfa-romeo, rounds 13) has no livery in the referenced skinpack/AI set and is not included in this pack.
The source custom-AI XML carries a large per-track (tracks="...") override set; those patches are not carried into this pack's aiOverrides in this version.
The source custom-AI XML carries no vehicle_reliability values on its base entries, so every team uses the generator default reliability of 0.5.
Authored display: engine acronyms are upper-cased in team names (McLaren-TAG, Brabham-BMW, Arrows-BMW, Benetton-BMW) — the generator's title-casing would emit 'Tag'/'Bmw'.

Mapping note: f1db's circuit full name for the 1986 Austrian GP venue is the modern 'Red Bull Ring'; the 1986 race ran the Österreichring at the same Spielberg site, and AMS2's Spielberg Historic (1977 layout, driven through 1987) is the era-correct binding — the round is not a placeholder.
